Ruixiang secretly listens in on Jun Sheng and finds out that the man who was after Yin Xi is a professional assassin named Mercy...

programme.title: SHERO - EP 14
programme.desc: Meihua orders Ah Biao to eliminate Gina. The police inform Yinchen of Yinxi's whereabouts. The SHERO team is delighted, and Yinchen makes plans to go to Australia immediately. Mercy finds Yinxi before Yinchen does, and attempts to kill her, but Yinchen and the others arrive just in time to stop him. As they question Mercy about the mastermind, Mercy gets shot by a sniper...

programme.title: The Blood of Youth - EP 17
programme.desc: Aspiring young hero Lei Wu Jie was on his way to the great Xue Yue City when he mistakenly strayed into the Fallen Snow Villa. His first heroic deed does not go as planned since he ended up owing the owner Xiao Se a debt for the damages to his place. Left with no choice, Lei Wu Jie takes Xiao Se along. On their journey, they meet Tang Lian who is a disciple of the Tang sect. Together, the group of youths embark on an adventure.

programme.title: The Blood of Youth - EP 18

programme.title: C. L. I. F. 5 - EP 3

Jess is the Vaccine Research and Development Expert and when her classmates prompted her on her new findings, she refused to reveal anything. Quy Vuong contacted Guo Tai asking them to meet with Jess for a deal and to kill her once it is completed.

programme.title: C. L. I. F. 5 - EP 4
programme.desc: Jess met with Man Ting and while Man Ting was on the phone, Jess placed a USB containing the vaccine program into Man Ting's bag, and purposely created an argument by bringing up long-standing problems and left. Thereafter, Jess was found dead in Pulau Ubin. Man Ting, being the last to see her, became the suspect.

programme.title: King Of Culinary - EP 7
programme.desc: Tonight, a graceful retiree Patricia finds her way here. She has a gentle personality but is undoubtedly a great cook. With chicken as today's theme, will she be able to defeat the chef of her choice? Another challenger Tai Boon Heng, who is a pastry chef, comes forward hoping to make his father and daughter proud. Will he be able to do so? And what strategies will the chefs come up with in order to defend their knives? Will Chef Eric Neo be able to uphold his reputation of "No losses"?

programme.title: News Tonight - EP 96
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Frontline - EP 14
programme.desc: Nearly 30 years after disappearing from Singapore, pork blood curd is back. One month on, has the excitement lasted? We look at consumer demand, supply shortages, food safety, and what it took to bring this traditional ingredient back to the table.

programme.title: No Other Way - EP 5
programme.desc: Shuheng and Victor find Junlei at an internet café. Junlei admits to dismembering Jenna’s body but denies murdering her. The police locate her final body part, and confirms the fatal wound was on Jenna’s thigh, inflicted by a knife in the villa. A bracelet then points to Julian as the killer. Just as Victor’s team sets out to arrest him, Hongtao brings Julian in to surrender.

Ouyang Zong obstructs Zhang Tie's search for an orchestra conductor in Singapore and uses legal regulations to prevent Xiao Cheng from leaving Hong Kong.

programme.title: Focus - EP 14

Is Britain failing to find the right leader, or are leaders trapped by the same constraints?

programme.desc: The Kale is a superfood packed with 23 essential nutrients to support daily dietary needs. Our organic pure kale powder contains no additives, preservatives, added antioxidants, or colorants, making it suitable for all ages to maintain a healthy lifestyle.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 303
programme.desc: Stay ahead of your heart health now with the Omron BP monitor. With a single press of a button, you can now get your blood pressure readings and detect possible atrial fibrillation (AFib), helping you stay ahead of a potential stroke.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 284

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 306
programme.desc: Enjoy hotpot with 2 different soup bases with the Morries Yuan Yang hot pot. Its 2200W high power ensures rapid boiling, bringing 2L of water to boil in just 9 minutes. programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 295
programme.desc: Developed by the Yi Si Yuan Medical Consultant Team, specially designed for respiratory health, strengthen immunity. It contains Tiger Milk Mushroom, Cordyceps, and Dendrobium Orchid, the exclusive formula helps maintain your lung’s health, suitable for people with coughs, nasal allergies, recurrent colds.

programme.title: No.17 Music Live House S2 - EP 7
programme.desc: Five popular musicians, Liang Long, Hu Xia, Bai Jugang, Curly G, and Huang Zihongfan, reversed their image as singers and served as Live House staff, starting this music journey again with a new attitude. At the same time, with the new slogan "There is always happiness to speak out", the program will witness more beauty and surprises in the music they deliver to the audience.

programme.title: Bravo, My Life - EP 55
programme.desc: (Dual Language Chinese and Korean) This series follows Xu Dongxi as she decides to raise her nephew as a single mother while struggling to establish herself as a designer.

programme.title: The Passbook - EP 23
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Thai) Long Geng reads the diary and discovers the secret about Bi De and the savings passbook. Bi An shares his knowldege about traditional textiles with Xiao Ping and her colleagues.

programme.title: Three Bold Siblings - EP 35
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Nanxiu accidentally witnesses the interaction between Maoyong and Sulin and begins to suspect that Sulin is the one Maoyong truly loves. Driven by this doubt, he confronts Sulin and demands an explanation for her presence at the company.

programme.title: Three Bold Siblings - EP 36
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Dongcan accuses Zhang Rongzhi of having known all along that he was not a prosecutor, deliberately concealing the truth. Enraged, Xiangmin confronts Rongzhi and refuses to believe any of his explanations.

programme.title: Freedom Travelers - EP 3
programme.desc: In Episode 3, Rongrong and Mile dive deeper into Busan, with Mile taking the wheel and leading the way. They visit a retro teahouse filled with nostalgic charm, savoring traditional Ssanghwa tea and embracing Korea’s slower pace of life. At Gijang Market, they feast on sweet, succulent snow crab and bravely try fermented skate, famously known as the second smelliest food in the world.

programme.title: Tale of the Nine-tailed - EP 11
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) The imoogi that has been reborn starts approaching Zhiya. She sees her past life where she was killed by Li Yan.

programme.title: News Tonight - EP 98
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Love Endures - EP 25
programme.desc: The story revolves around seven lifelong companions who reside in the same area, relying on and supporting each other through their toughest times. They undergo separation and reunite years later.

To keep Wang, safe, Bai must bond with him on his road to the Imperial examination and fends off threats from mythical creatures and evil spirits.

programme.title: Lirikan Kamu Lain Bikin Pengen Log In
programme.desc: Dinda (Shanice Margaretha) lands a job interview through a friend's recommendation, only to realize her new boss is Wildan (Aditya Zoni)—the very man who had just knocked her down in a reckless roadside accident. Despite their rocky start, working closely together begins to blur the lines between professionalism and romance.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 46

programme.title: JURUS TUKANG ES KELAPA MEMETIK CINTA
programme.desc: Running away from an unwanted wedding, Wina (Larasati Nugroho) crosses paths with Jali (Randy Pangalila), a humble coconut ice vendor. The plot thickens when she realizes Jali is the son of Nyak Rodiah, the owner of the Kumbang Tanduk martial arts school—the bitter, long-time rival of her own family's school, Macan Merah

programme.title: TAJWID CINTA - EP 20

programme.title: Jangan Pinjol Hatiku, Nanti Semakin Berbunga
programme.desc: Drowning in family debt, Mita (Jennifer Eve) is pressured by her mother to find a wealthy husband to save them from financial ruin. She thinks she has hit the jackpot when she hooks the perfect rich bachelor, Dirga (Lucky Perdana). However, her dream turns into a shock when she discovers Dirga is actually the son of the very debt collector hunting her parents down.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 46

Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: CINTA GUDEG MERCON SENG ADA LAWAN
programme.desc: Jaya chooses a humble life selling spicy gudeg mercon (traditional jackfruit stew) over inheriting his father's multi-million company. Meanwhile, a newly bankrupt Neysa (Maudy Effrosina) is struggling to run her late mother’s catering business. When Neysa tries Jaya’s rustic dish for the first time, her stomach rebels, causing her to vomit. The crowd mistakenly panics, assuming Jaya’s gudeg is poisonous, sparking a fierce rivalry between the two food vendors

programme.title: Yak Yak Yey - EP 8
programme.desc: Himpunan sketsa komedi pendek pecah perut yang menggabungkan selebriti tanah air terdiri daripada pelawak,pelakon,penyanyi dan pempengaruh media sosial .

programme.title: Meja Panggang - EP 2
programme.desc: Saksikan mereka 'memanggang' para tetamu dengan soalan-soalan panas tentang kisah lampau dan peribadi mereka.

programme.title: Saka Sisters - EP 2
programme.desc: Laila & Suri baru saja kematian Ayah. Mereka dikejutkan dengan kehadiran saka. Jamal, ekori mereka ke mana saja. Laila & Suri yang selama ini tidak rapat, terpaksa selesaikan hal Jamal bersama-sama.

programme.title: Miss Lawak - EP 6
programme.desc: Dihoskan oleh Dato' Afdlin Shauki selain Erra Fazira & Dato' AC Mizal sebagai juri tetap, siapakah di antara 18 gadis yang bakal merebut gelaran juara Miss Lawak 2019?

programme.title: Buka Kedai : Now In Tokyo - EP 3
programme.desc: Buka Kedai: Now in Tokyo menampilkan 4 selebriti Malaysia yang terdiri daripada Nabila Huda, Shashic, Leona dan Eric. Mereka bakal melakukan misi berniaga di Tokyo, Jepun.

programme.title: Tanya Sama Pokok - EP 4
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang kehidupan di sebuah kampung moden yang sudah semakin terdedah dengan kemodenan tetapi dalam waktu yang sama masih mengekalkan ciri-ciri hidup berkampung.

programme.title: 3 dara kg.com - EP 1
programme.desc: Esah, Awa dan Noi, tiga dara pingitan yang berkawan baik meski berbeza personaliti. Mereka berhijrah ke Kuala Lumpur untuk bekerja dan secara tak sengaja bertemu Kak Lala, seorang tauke jamu terkenal

programme.title: Komediri - EP 6
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan 'Stand Up Comedy' yang mempersembahkan 3 pelawak dan di hoskan oleh Harith Iskander.

programme.title: Punchline DAC S2 - EP 4
programme.desc: Lebih meriah, lebih kecoh! Saksikan program variasi terbaharu yang menampilkan Dato' AC Mizal beraksi bersama PS Mansur dan tetamu jemputan yang bakal membuat anda tidak kering gusi!

programme.title: Frust Gila - EP 13
programme.desc: Frust Gila rancangan permainan penuh cabaran untuk 3 peserta, cabaran di sediakan untuk mendapatkan hanya satu pemenang.

programme.title: Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat S2 - EP 7
programme.desc: Dato’ AC Mizal kini Kembali Bersama geng latah seperti Eida Moin, PS Mansur, Wan Raja Lawak dan ramai lagi dalam musim terbaru Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat.

programme.title: Kail Pagi Makan Petang - EP 11
programme.desc: Program mengisahkan tentang teknik memancing dan ikuti pengembaran mereka untuk mengetahui ikan yang ditangkap dan masakan menarik yang akan disediakan.

programme.title: Buana Oh Buana - EP 8
programme.desc: Sitcom komedi yang berkisahkan kehidupan masyarakat yang tinggal di kampung dan bandar dengan isu-isu yang berbangkit lakonan Ajak, Yassin dan Shuib

programme.title: Sepahtu Reunion - EP 1
programme.desc: Rancangan menarik untuk tontonan anda semua.

programme.title: Sepahtu - EP 5
programme.desc: Rancangan gelak ketawa untuk anda sekeluarga.

programme.title: Siapa Jaga Mak? - EP 6
programme.desc: Diilhamkan oleh kisah-kisah pengasuh yang benar, Siapa Jaga Mak ceritakan tentang empat keluarga yang menghadapi pelbagai emosi daripada penjagaan orang tua.

programme.title: Lawak Tak Lagha 3 - EP 1
programme.desc: Kembali dengan musim baru, dengan memberi kelainan dan nafas baru, kehidupan peribadi sebagai pelawak dan selebriti dengan seorang Ustaz.

programme.title: Karoot Komedia X SR2 - EP 18
programme.desc: Karoot Komedia adalah sebuah rancangan komedi muzikal yang menggabungkan muzik, lakonan sketsa dengan topik-topik menarik yang akan dilakonkan secara spontan oleh pelawak terkenal Malaysia

programme.title: Lawak Minggu Ini - EP 1
programme.desc: Program menarik yang akan menghiburkan anda semua.

programme.title: Life At Thinker - EP 16
programme.desc: Life At Thinker adalah sebuah program vlog atau diari yang memaparkan aktiviti-aktiviti menarik dan kegilaan krew-krew Thinker Studios di sepanjang minggu.

programme.title: Hikayat Bawang Putih Bawang Merah - EP 2
programme.desc: Bawang Putih tinggal bersama ibu tiri dan adik tiri dan setiap hari didera. Putih melarikan diri dan bertembung dengan Putera rupawan di dalam hutan Inderaloka.

programme.title: #havocwarna - EP 12

programme.title: Gelap Geli Tak - EP 11

programme.title: RSVP Aku Datang - EP 12

programme.title: Muka Buku - EP 3

programme.desc: Elly berpindah dari bandar ke pekan kecil untuk mencari ketenangan. Tetapi kenangan buruk tetap menghantui dirinya, sehinggalah dia bertemu dengan Karl yang mengajarnya erti sebuah kebahagiaan.

programme.title: Siapa Jaga Mak? - EP 7
programme.desc: Diilhamkan oleh kisah-kisah pengasuh yang benar, Siapa Jaga Mak ceritakan tentang empat keluarga yang menghadapi pelbagai emosi daripada penjagaan orang tua.

programme.title: Lawak Tak Lagha 3 - EP 2
programme.desc: Kembali dengan musim baru, dengan memberi kelainan dan nafas baru, kehidupan peribadi sebagai pelawak dan selebriti dengan seorang Ustaz.

programme.title: Karoot Komedia X SR2 - EP 19
programme.desc: Karoot Komedia adalah sebuah rancangan komedi muzikal yang menggabungkan muzik, lakonan sketsa dengan topik-topik menarik yang akan dilakonkan secara spontan oleh pelawak terkenal Malaysia

programme.title: Lawak Minggu Ini - EP 2
programme.desc: Program menarik yang akan menghiburkan anda semua.

programme.title: Life At Thinker - EP 17
programme.desc: Life At Thinker adalah sebuah program vlog atau diari yang memaparkan aktiviti-aktiviti menarik dan kegilaan krew-krew Thinker Studios di sepanjang minggu.

programme.title: The Cadets - EP 6
programme.desc: Mengisahkan perjuangan empat sekawan - Amir, Farah, Hakim dan Liz - untuk membuktikan bahawa pasukan mereka mampu mengatasi segala cabaran untuk mewakili Kadet bomba di Kem Jamboree Kebangsaan.

programme.title: #havocwarna - EP 13
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan yang menggabungkan sketsa, spontan, prank, zumba dan lain lain lagi

programme.title: Gelap Geli Tak - EP 12
programme.desc: Game show terbaru di hoskan oleh Faizal Ismail. Peserta bersaing antara satu sama lain dalam pelbagai cabaran, tapi muslihatnya mereka ditempatkan dalam persekitaran gelap gelita

programme.title: RSVP Aku Datang - EP 13
programme.desc: RSVP menonjolkan pelbagai acara dari berbagai kaum diMalaysia dari majlis perkahwinan, majlis aqiqah hinggalah ke majlis Ponggal dan banyak lagi.

programme.title: Muka Buku - EP 4
programme.desc: Muka Buku ialah rancangan permainan teka-teki, di mana selebriti perlu meneka antara empat peserta, siapa yang palsu dan siapa yang Muka Buku Sebenar.

programme.title: CTDK-ation - EP 7
programme.desc: Program realiti perjalanan Dato Sri Siti Nurhaliza 'VACATION' adalah program menampilkan keluarga besar Dato Sri Siti Nurhaliza.

programme.title: Betul Ke Bohong? S4 - EP 4
programme.desc: Panel selebriti memilih jawapan berdasarkan kenyataan dan cerita yang mungkin benar atau tidak, 2 kumpulan berentap untuk perolehi markah tertinggi.

programme.title: Kalau Berani 1 vs 0 - EP 7
programme.desc: Rancagan menarik untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Cik Ayu Mee Sanggul - EP 12
programme.desc: Ayu janda muda yang selalu memakai kebaya tradisional. Dia mengahwini seorang lelaki bernama Akhtar tanpa ikatan cinta agar dapat menjadi ibu kepada anak duda yang ada penyakit Major Thalassemia.

programme.title: Jaguh Kampung 3 - EP 7
programme.desc: Saksikan para peserta yang mewakili kampung masing masing bertanding dalam acara memasak dengan menu ala kampung.

programme.title: Dr. Pontianak - EP 3
programme.desc: Dr.Vivy terkejut mendapati dirinya terbangun di sebuah longkang. Lebih pelik bila Dr.Vivy mampu melihat Edna, penunggu hospital. Lebih pelik lagi, kewujudan paku di leher Dr.Vivy.

programme.title: Yuna Bintang Di Langit - EP 5
programme.desc: Ikuti perjalanan Yuna dalam merealisasikan impiannya.

programme.title: Next To Neelofa - EP 4
programme.desc: Program bual bicara Neelofa bakal membincangkan secara mendalam beberapa topik merangkumi kesihatan, kesejahteraan, cinta, kecantikan & gaya, perihal wanita, keibubapaan, perhubungan dan kerjaya.

programme.title: PHD Muzik - EP 10
programme.desc: Sebuah game show yang menggabungkan artis dan pasangan mereka bertarung dalam pelbagai jenis permainan untuk memenangi gelaran "PHD Muzik".

programme.title: 3 Bahadol
programme.desc: 3 anak muda bersaing untuk mendapatkan cinta Si Laila, gadis paling jelita di kampung untuk dijadikan isteri. Malangnya, Laila itu, anak kepada Bomoh paling terkenal di kampung mereka.

programme.title: Bunga Hati - EP 18
programme.desc: Seorang gadis miskin berdepan dengan konflik antara ibu yang membencinya dan abangnya yang cacat serta terperangkap dalam cinta tiga segi antara kekasih pertama dan doktor jutawan.

programme.title: Cinta Round 1
programme.desc: Farid adalah lelaki kutu buku yang selalu dibuli oleh Syakirin, seniornya. Farid bertekad untuk memasuki kejohanan MMA yang dianjurkan oleh universiti mereka supaya dapat diakhiri oleh Syakirin.

programme.title: Lagi Riuh... Macam Macam Aznil - EP 4
programme.desc: Dato' Aznil Haji Nawawi kini kembali dalam musim terbaru Lagi Riuh Macam Macam Aznil, lebih riuh, lebih meriah and lebih menghiburkan.

programme.title: Mr London Ms Langkawi - EP 14
programme.desc: Aidid yang di besarkan di luar negara bertemu sepupunya Nana, yang berjiwa besar cintakan tanah air. Walaupun mereka sering berselisih pendapat namun akhirnya disatukan atas kehendak keluarga.

programme.title: Kak Kek Ke Kelate - EP 4
programme.desc: Kak Kek, alter ego Catriona Ross akan menjelajah ke Kelantan untuk mencari makanan viral di Kelantan di samping membawa penonton meneroka keunikan dan tempat menarik yang ada.

programme.title: Rahsia Hati Perempuan - EP 16
programme.desc: Mikael, Zayn & Ilaina adalah kawan baik semenjak kecil. Ilaina dan keluarga telah berpindah ke Australia. Berputik cinta antara mereka dan siapakah Arissa?

programme.title: Jangan Lupa Janji - EP 10
programme.desc: Hubungan Afia dan Dr Iskandar semakin renggang, namun Mariam masih lagi berharap hubungan mereka itu akan berkekalan. Mikael masih lagi bersikap keras kepala.

programme.title: Juara Joran - EP 8
programme.desc: Rancangan realiti yang melibatkan seorang pemancing dan seorang artis dalam satu pasukan. Mereka akan bersaing melalui cabaran ketahanan fizikal, mental, bakat memancing dan memasak.

programme.title: Tiada Hari yang Tak Indah - EP 10
programme.desc: Kisah tentang kehidupan keluarga Hj. Zainal yang mempunyai 3 orang anak perempuan dengan perwatakan yang berbeza. Mereka menghadapi masalah seperti hal keluarga, percintaan, dan persahabatan.

programme.title: JMT - EP 1
programme.desc: Saksikan Michael Ang membawa artis pilihan bersama peminat setianya menjejaki makanan unik dan menyediakan semula hidangan tersebut dengan sentuhan cita rasa tempatan

programme.title: Konsert Gempak Superstar - EP 3
programme.desc: 10 bintang lakonan tanah air menyerlahkan bakat nyanyian mereka di pentas konsert Gempak Superstar. Siapakah yang terus mara untuk bergelar penghibur serba boleh?

programme.title: Teroka Lokal - EP 12
programme.desc: Teroka Lokal adalah program travelog dengan hos selebriti yang akan mengembara untuk mencari tempat-tempat tersembunyi yang menarik di Malaysia.

programme.title: Jangan Lupa Janji - EP 11
programme.desc: Ikmal dan Mikail adalah anak angkat kepada Mona. Ikmal bekerja keras supaya Mikail mendapat pendidikan yang bagus di kolej. Namun Mikail terjerumus dengan pelbagai masalah akibat salah berkawan.

programme.title: Travel Anak Beranak - EP 6
programme.desc: Sharifah Shahirah dan Adira Suhaimi bersama anak masing-masing berangkat ke Perth, Australia mengharungi cabaran lucu dan tidak dijangka yang menguji batas diri mereka, sambil menikmati keindahan landskap.

programme.title: Curi-Curi Cuti - EP 4
programme.desc: Saksikan Kamal Adli sebagai hos membawa selebriti bercuti bersama peminatnya dalam Curi-Curi Cuti di bawah kempen #expeRIAnce.

programme.title: Tiada Hari yang Tak Indah - EP 10
programme.desc: Kisah tentang kehidupan keluarga Hj. Zainal yang mempunyai 3 orang anak perempuan dengan perwatakan yang berbeza. Mereka menghadapi masalah seperti hal keluarga, percintaan, dan persahabatan.

programme.title: Gantung - EP 1
programme.desc: Gibbs, Ray, KJ dan Troll adalah The Musketeers. Mereka membuat perjanjian untuk tidak mempunyai kekasih dan berkongsi gadis antara mereka. Tetapi, apa terjadi bila janji itu dilanggar?

programme.title: Dah Mati Pun Cantik
programme.desc: Mayat seorang wanita yang kekal cantik menimbulkan seribu tanda tanya kepada dua koroner di sebuah bilik bedah siasat.

programme.title: Malaysian Ghost Stories - EP 1
programme.desc: Nusantara merupakan satu daerah yang tebal dengan semangat mistik dan alam ghaib. Setiap episod mempunyai penyelesaian yang unik bergantung kepada jenis gangguan, jenis jin dan kesan ke atas watak utama.

programme.title: Jangan Lupa Janji - EP 11
programme.desc: Ikmal dan Mikail adalah anak angkat kepada Mona. Ikmal bekerja keras supaya Mikail mendapat pendidikan yang bagus di kolej. Namun Mikail terjerumus dengan pelbagai masalah akibat salah berkawan.

programme.title: Pok Ya Cong Codei Memburu Siti - EP 6
programme.desc: Selepas ditinggalkan Siti, Pok Ya tidak berhasrat untuk mencarinya sehinggalah mendapat tahu Siti sedang mengandungkan anaknya. Misi menjejaki Siti semakin tegang setelah mengetahui dia sebenarnya diculik!

programme.title: Aku Bukan BIMBO - EP 13
programme.desc: Elsuraya percaya Azad adalah punca kematian ibu bapanya dalam satu kemalangan dan membenci lelaki itu yang dalam diam mencintainya. Perkara sebenar disimpan rapi oleh Azad dan sahabat baiknya, Dani Ikram.

programme.title: Rahsia Hati Perempuan - EP 16

programme.title: Karan Arjun
programme.desc: Reborn in different lands, Karan and Arjun reunite through their mother's faith, rising again to take revenge on those who destroyed them in a past life. Release Year: 1995 Director: Rakesh Roshan Awards: Best Action- Bikhu Verma, Best Editing- Sanjay Varma.

programme.title: Foot Fairy
programme.desc: When a serial killer with a foot fetish goes on the loose in Mumbai targetting young women, CBI officer Vivan Deshmukh is tasked with finding the murderer. Will he succeed? Release Year: 2020 Director: Kanishk Varma

programme.title: Cirkus
programme.desc: Chaos reigns due to a case of mistaken identity when two sets of twins who were separated at birth coincidentally visit the same city. Release Year: 2022 Director: Rohit Shetty

programme.title: Game Changer
programme.desc: Ram Nandan, a government official, embarks on a relentless fight against corrupt politicians. Determined to bring about fair elections, he tries to revolutionise the way the government operates.

programme.title: Jawan
programme.desc: Fueled by vengeance and a long-held promise, a man sets out to cleanse society's evils, confronting a ruthless outlaw whose reign of terror has brought misery to countless lives. Release Year: 2023 Director: Atlee Kumar

programme.title: Ajab Gazabb Love
programme.desc: Rajveer, a rich man, falls in love with Madhuri. However, he soon realises that she detests affluent people and in order to win her heart, he, along with his family, pretends to be poor. Release Year: 2012 Director: Sanjay Gadhvi

programme.title: CityLights
programme.desc: Deepak Singh, an ex-army person from Rajasthan, moves to Mumbai with his family hoping for a better lifestyle. However, upon arrival, he realises that everything is not as easy as it seems. Release Year: 2014 Director: Hansal Mehta Awards: 7th Mirchi Music Awards

programme.title: Blank
programme.desc: A suicide bomber loses his memory and has a bomb attached to his heart. It is up to the police officers to prevent this bomb from taking innocent lives. Release Year: 2019 Director: Behzad Khambata

programme.desc: Aspiring actor Vikram wishes to make it big in Bollywood. His dream does come true, however, it affects his relationship with Sona. programme.title: Edmond Et Lucy - EP 47
programme.desc: Edmond the squirrel and Lucy the bear cub grew up together. They live in a majestic chestnut tree in the heart of the forest. With their friends they solve riddles and live thrilling adventures, with every day bringing new wonders to discover in the natural world around them.

programme.title: Pompon Ours - EP 45
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Pompon Ours - EP 46
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Il etait Une Fois... Ces Droles D'objets - EP 75
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: 1001 Mondes Antiques - EP 1
programme.desc: Braillard, Colombe and Lablatte have discovered a way of travelling back through ancient eras and civilisations. They embark on a journey back in time, passing through popular civilisations such as ancient Egypt and Greece, as well as sub-Saharan Africa, the Middle East and Mesopotamia.

programme.title: Conte-Nous ! - EP 1
programme.desc: A long, long time ago, in the heart of the African savannah, animals still had the gift of speech. It was also a time of story-telling, of tales that had so much to teach us, where the main character was a lion, a hyena, a leopard or a frog.

programme.title: Quasimodo - EP 1
programme.desc: Paris, 1483. 16-year-old Quasimodo is a hunchbacked orphan. One day, the gypsy Esmeralda, with whom he is in love, finds herself in trouble. He sacrifices himself to save her and ends up in prison. And so begins a long series of adventures...

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Cosy, Le Mag Deco - EP 6
programme.desc: Caroline Boeglin goes in search of astonishing lodgings. She shares her love of finding objects in antique markets, her DIY ideas and her interior design touch that transforms a room. Decoration and renovation are the key words for her discoveries.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil - EP 1852
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Passe-Moi Les Jumelles - EP 1
programme.desc: Join Matthieu Fournier as he follows windsurfing champion Pauline Katz, then returns to Switzerland to showcase the breathtaking work of Francois Staub, a high-end cabinetmaker driven by freedom.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Poulets Grilles - EP 3
programme.desc: Who killed Sofia Popova, the cleaning lady at the Leroy family hotel? The 4th brigade is determined to prove its effectiveness in this investigation. But when a second murder occurs, the main suspect turns out to be Eva. Time is running out to prove her innocence and unmask the killer.

programme.title: Le Spectacle De La Fete Du Canada 2026
programme.desc: At LeBreton Flats Park in Ottawa, before several thousand people, the Canada Day show brings together, as every year, many talented artists for an exceptional concert.

programme.title: Sous Le Tapis
programme.desc: Odile and Jean are getting ready to host their children and grandchildren at their house in the country for Odile's birthday. When Jean suddenly dies of cardiac arrest, Odile panics and hides the body under the bed...

programme.title: Pour Toi Flora - EP 1
programme.desc: Remi Dumont, an indigenous boarding school survivor in search of healing and redemption wants to tell his story.

programme.title: Pour Toi Flora - EP 2
programme.desc: New revelations turn Julianne's life upside down.

programme.title: Tendance XXI - EP 24
programme.desc: The House of Christian Dior launches its 4th Women at Dior mentoring programme. How to associate burgundy in men's fashion.

programme.title: En Marge Du Monde - EP 4

programme.title: Slam
programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada

programme.title: Edmond Et Lucy - EP 48
programme.desc: Edmond the squirrel and Lucy the bear cub grew up together. They live in a majestic chestnut tree in the heart of the forest. With their friends they solve riddles and live thrilling adventures, with every day bringing new wonders to discover in the natural world around them.

programme.title: Pompon Ours - EP 47
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Pompon Ours - EP 48
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Il etait Une Fois... Ces Droles D'objets - EP 76
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: 1001 Mondes Antiques - EP 2
programme.desc: Braillard, Colombe and Lablatte have discovered a way of travelling back through ancient eras and civilisations. They embark on a journey back in time, passing through popular civilisations such as ancient Egypt and Greece, as well as sub-Saharan Africa, the Middle East and Mesopotamia.

programme.title: Conte-Nous ! - EP 2
programme.desc: A long, long time ago, in the heart of the African savannah, animals still had the gift of speech. It was also a time of story-telling, of tales that had so much to teach us, where the main character was a lion, a hyena, a leopard or a frog.

programme.title: Quasimodo - EP 2
programme.desc: Paris, 1483. 16-year-old Quasimodo is a hunchbacked orphan. One day, the gypsy Esmeralda, with whom he is in love, finds herself in trouble. He sacrifices himself to save her and ends up in prison. And so begins a long series of adventures...

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Cosy, Le Mag Deco - EP 7
programme.desc: Caroline Boeglin goes in search of astonishing lodgings. She shares her love of finding objects in antique markets, her DIY ideas and her interior design touch that transforms a room. Decoration and renovation are the key words for her discoveries.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil - EP 1853
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. programme.title: Le Point
programme.desc: Magazine programme which explores issues relating to society, science and the environment, involving investigations and in-depth analysis, from a resolutely Canadian perspective.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: La Bride Sur Le Cou
programme.desc: Sophie, a model, discovers that her lover Philippe, is interested in someone else. Madly jealous, the young woman has only one thing in mind: use whatever means necessary to break their romance. She begins by being seen in public with other men. Will that suffice to catch the photographer's attention?

programme.title: Foreigners
programme.desc: Jim, 15, is deeply shaken by the arrival of Neil, his British father whom he hasn't seen in five years. The teenager is about to be adopted by his stepfather, with whom he has formed a true bond. But Neil refuses to give up his parental rights...

programme.title: La Nourrice
programme.desc: Disabled following a work accident, Yara spends his time at home assembling miniature models, under the reproaches of his wife. Drug traffickers have also chosen him to secretly guard their loot. Until the day when some disturbing delivery men show up at his door.

programme.title: Cesar Wagner - EP 8
programme.desc: Wagner attends his mother's wedding in a sumptuous stately home. But behind the scenes tragedy strikes: the body of an unknown man has been found in the cold room. As a favour to his mother, Wagner agrees not to insist that the celebration be cancelled and investigates with his team.

programme.title: Sports Life
programme.desc: Glíma, Iceland’s traditional Viking wrestling, is on the brink of extinction. programme.title: BWF Thomas & Uber Cup Finals 2026
programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.title: PGA Tour 2026
programme.desc: The Travelers Championship is a professional golf tournament on the PGA Tour in Cromwell, Connecticut, a suburb south of Hartford. Since 1984 the tournament has been held at TPC River Highlands. The tournament was founded 73 years ago in 1952. Over the last decade, longer hitters have done well at the tournament, with Stewart Cink, Hunter Mahan, J. J. Henry, Phil Mickelson, and Bubba Watson combining for six victories over a 10-year span.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Themba Gorimbo vs. Luke Michael
programme.desc: This episode features Themba 'The Answer' Gorimbo and Luke 'Young Gun' Michael battling for the vacant welterweight championship. Vicious ground and pound ends this fight before the end of Round 1. Bonus coverage includes Sizwe Mnikathi vs. August Kayambala.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Yuriorkis Gamboa vs. Marcos Ramirez
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features undefeated featherweights Yuriorkis Gamboa, 'El Cinclon de Guantanamo', (11-0, 9 KOs) and Marcos Ramirez (25-0, 16 KOs) from the Pechanga Resort and Casino in Temecula, California, USA, on October 4, 2008. The two young fighters had a quick ending street brawl that brought the crowd to its feet.

programme.title: FS WCK Tyler Duangsay vs. Chris Paez
programme.desc: Experience the intensity of World Championship Kickboxing with the WCK Muay Thai Rules series, bringing elite international fighters into the spotlight for non-stop action. From explosive knockouts and technical battles to the electrifying atmosphere that has made Muay Thai one of the fastest-growing combat sports in the world, every bout delivers the excitement of world-class kickboxing. Featuring rising stars and seasoned champions, catch all of the power, precision, and heart of WCK Muay Thai

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Amir Khan vs. Danny Garcia
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a light welterweight title unification bout between Amir Khan and Danny Garcia. Also on the card, former heavyweight champ James Kirkland.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Yuriorkis Gamboa vs. Marcos Ramirez

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 8
programme.desc: The Squirrels are playing outside, when out of a bush jumps the cutest creature they ever did see. They think it is simply adorable and tell it so... with startling results. The creature bursts into tears! The creature, whose name is Plinky, tells them her whole family are monsters, and that's what she's supposed to be, but she just cannot get the hang of it. The Squirrels are keen to help Plinky get in touch with her scary side. Fortunately, Duggee has his monster badge.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 9
programme.desc: The day starts when Duggee moves a cupboard, and the Squirrels find a dusty, old book behind it. It's Duggee's diary from when he was a teenager! The Squirrels aren't sure what a diary is, so Duggee explains by reading some extracts. The Squirrels are keen to write diaries of their own.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 10
programme.desc: It's a lovely day, so everyone is playing outside. Things take a turn when Roly needs a wee, because the door is locked and Duggee has mislaid the key. The Squirrels start looking around for it, but they have no luck. Not to worry, Duggee has his metal detector, Helen. After demonstrating it to the Squirrels, they are very keen to give it a go.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 11
programme.desc: The Squirrels find Duggee's cheerleader pompoms, so he shows them his old moves. Time to practice: Duggee at the chess board, the Squirrels as a squad. There's a big match ahead...

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 12
programme.desc: When they're accidentally shut in the shed, Duggee shows the Squirrels how to make the time pass with calm breathing and made-up games. The Squirrels cope so well. Does Duggee?

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 23
programme.desc: Have you seen Duggee? Help the Squirrels search for him, but they need to stick together!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 24
programme.desc: Duggee looks all around, but can he find the Squirrels? Let’s play Hide and Seek!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 25
programme.desc: The Super Squirrels are called to action! Time to stop Dr Catastrophe and save their toys!

programme.desc: Join the chickens in space for the big finale of Agony and Eggstacy! Mucho Suspense!

This is because Glitch has been drilling into it, and it could mean that the volcano is going to erupt!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 22
programme.desc: The sun is setting, and the squirrels are sitting on the sofa. They've had a very busy day. Suddenly all the lights go out! POP! Oh dear, there's been a power cut. The squirrels can't see anything! Thanks, goodness Duggee has got his torch, and he has torches for everyone.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 23
programme.desc: Tino and Eugene are having a disagreement about an amateur dramatic show they want to put on. One wants an all singing all dancing extravaganza while the other, a serious drama. Can Duggee and the squirrels help them get something ready to perform?

programme.desc: It's time for a family game of hide and seek. Everyone hides, while Bluey counts to twenty, but will she be able to stay focused on the game and not get distracted by all her toys.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 43
programme.desc: While on a camping holiday, Bluey makes a new friend named called Jean-Luc. Bluey may not understand him, but they find a common language playing and hunting for a wild Daddy pig.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 44
programme.desc: Bingo and Bluey have five minutes to bed, just enough time to race to the summit of Mount Mumandad. But for them, facing powerful storms, avalanches and stinky spots will take teamwork.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 45
programme.desc: A quick trip to the shops proves tricky for Dad, when Bingo and Bluey want to play a game of 'Kids'. Now Bluey is Mum, Bingo's her baby and for Dad however, he is a very naughty boy.

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures S01 - EP 20
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout embark on a global adventure in Thailand's wetlands on a mission to discover a way to stop invasive golden apple snails from devouring the vegetation. Along the way, Andy hitches a ride with a bird called a purple swamphen.

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures S01 - EP 21
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout jet off in the Explorer to Vienna, Austria, on a global adventure to solve the mystery of an animal behaving strangely in a churchyard. Along the way, Andy meets a wild European hamster with a taste for flowers and candle wax.

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 81
programme.desc: Tinky Winky and Dipsy both want a go with Tinky Winky's bag and start to squabble. The Noo-­Noo sucks up the bag and only gives it back when Tinky Winky and Dipsy are ready to share.

programme.title: Yakka Dee S06 - EP 15
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'hand' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see shaking, making and baking hands. We wash our hands, reach high with them, and Dee waves goodbye with her hand! The journey is repeated with some special surprises along the way, and everyone has a boogie when Dee's friend finally succeeds in saying today's word.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S01 - EP 13
programme.desc: Messy finds a very dusty sock underneath his bed, but why does it make him teary? He goes to OKIDO to find out.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 52
programme.desc: A mystery is afoot! Somebody's been digging up and running off with Jackson's giant vegetables. Detectives Mojo and Bo must follow the clues to the cagey culprit.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 5
programme.desc: Dad pretends he was born yesterday. Bluey and Bingo have to guide him through his second day on Earth, especially when he discovers food is delicious and steals Lucky's Dad's pie.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 4
programme.desc: Bingo is helping Mum make an omelette for Dad's birthday breakfast, but cracking eggs is harder than it looks, and Dad is getting hungrier by the minute.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 6
programme.desc: All the Squirrels are having a fine old time playing with the hose. All except one, poor Tag whose feet hurt. 'Why do my feet hurt?', he asks Duggee. While Duggee has a think, he tells them 'why' is a great question, and the Squirrels are quick to follow up.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 5
programme.desc: Duggee is encouraging the Squirrels to come outside by gesturing through the window. They don't understand what he's doing and think it's funny. When he comes inside, a bit exasperated, he explains that he was miming. They want to know what miming is, and Duggee fondly recalls his days as a young Parisian street performer. The Squirrels are keen to learn how to mime, and Duggee runs them through the basics.

programme.desc: Duggie chooses a key and his blue digger to dig up a big bone. The chipmunk makes a delivery to the squirrels.

programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Fortress of Fun, where Kingsley and Queenie have fun looking for peas with the Playtimers in their Pea Party game.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 5
programme.desc: Duggee is encouraging the Squirrels to come outside by gesturing through the window. They don't understand what he's doing and think it's funny. programme.desc: All of the Teletubbies are stuck. Tinky Winky's hand is stuck in the bag, Dipsy's hat is stuck, Laa-­Laa's ball is stuck and Po is stuck on the Tubby Slidey!

programme.title: Yakka Dee S06 - EP 16
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'pumpkin', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. There is an orange pumpkin, a bumpy pumpkin and a pumpkin with lots of seeds. The journey is repeated with some special surprises along the way, and everyone has a boogie when Dee's friend finally succeeds in saying today's word.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S01 - EP 14
programme.desc: Messy wants to know how his goldfish friend can stay underwater for so long. He goes to OKIDO to find out.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 27
programme.desc: Preston left an egg sandwich out for too long, and now its explosive smell is stinking up the whole town. Mojo and Bo need to evacuate everyone in Swoppiton before the eggy 'stinkplosion'!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 6
programme.desc: When Dad complains about how dissimilar Bluey and Bingo are, Bluey hatches a plan to make them more alike and happily introduces Mini-Bluey!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 5
programme.desc: Dad pretends he was born yesterday. Bluey and Bingo have to guide him through his second day on Earth, especially when he discovers food is delicious and steals Lucky's Dad's pie.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 7
programme.desc: It's news time at the Clubhouse, and the Squirrels share their exciting news of the week with each other. Happy got a new bath sponge, Norrie is growing a sunflower and Roly, after thinking hard if he's got any news at all, remembers he's getting a new brother or sister. The Squirrels have all sorts of questions to ask.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 6
programme.desc: All the Squirrels are having a fine old time playing with the hose. All except one, poor Tag whose feet hurt. 'Why do my feet hurt?', he asks Duggee. While Duggee has a think, he tells them 'why' is a great question, and the Squirrels are quick to follow up.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 22
programme.desc: What’s that bouncy, pingy, whacking sound? It’s the Penguins playing ping-pong!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 21
programme.desc: Duggie chooses a key and his blue digger to dig up a big bone. The chipmunk makes a delivery to the squirrels.

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 28
programme.desc: Grandmaster Glitch has turned the Segovia Aqueduct into a giant water slide, by removing some of it's ancient stones to make it slope. But taking some of the perfectly balanced stones away means that the tall columns of the aqueduct are wobbling, and could come crashing down! The Go Jetters don't have long to stop Glitch and re-build the historic structure - Go Jetters, Go!

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 47
programme.desc: Bluey needs her Mum's advice on dealing with a troublesome neighbour, when the serenity of her couch cushion playhouse is threatened by Bingo's own growing stable of animals.

programme.title: Bluey S02 - EP 50
programme.desc: Grandad is supposed to be resting, but when Bluey and Bingo go to visit him, he makes a run for it with the kids and takes them on a madcap adventure into the bush.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 18
programme.desc: When a heavy summer rain thunders over the Heeler home, Bluey is determined to dam the water in the front yard, while Mum tries to stop her constantly tracking mud into the house.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 19
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo make mud pizzas and deliver them to the grown-ups, but their pedal car's wheel keeps falling off.

programme.title: Andy's Baby Animal Missions S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to Botswana, Africa and embark on a baby animal mission to help a meerkat family move home. Along the way, Andy meets some zebra and must race across an enormous salt pan to escape a hungry jackal.

programme.title: Playtime Towers S01 - EP 7
programme.desc: Bella plays funny games with Lift using her colourful towel. Together, they visit Hettie in the Ice Disco, who uses a big towel to make up a new dance - the Butterfly Boogie!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 22
programme.desc: It's time for the summer fair. Eugene is the organiser, but it's so much work that he quits - he can't take the pressure. So it's up to the Squirrels and their friends to find a new leader.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 21
programme.desc: The squirrels have to solve the mystery of the missing red ruby.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 20
programme.desc: It's crazy golf time and the everyone has to make their own courses.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 33
programme.desc: The Go Jetters test their knowledge and teamwork in a tricky maze full of trials. But can they escape the labyrinth, beat Glitch's high score and still keep the team together?

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 32
programme.desc: The team goes on a jungle expedition to find a mysterious creature. But while they race to discover a brand new species, something seems to be watching them from the treetops.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S23 - EP 23
programme.desc: Thomas and the steam trains spring into action when Porter and the diesel engines run into a series of accidents that throw their deliveries off track.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 8
programme.desc: Stanley must deliver some parcels on the train but ends up delivering the wrong ones. After correcting his mistake, he has to muster the townsfolk to help stop his runaway train.

programme.desc: Stanley must track down the missing library book, 'The Little Book of New Things to Do'. He visits various townsfolk who have leant the book to each other.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals S01 - EP 18

programme.desc: Young François witnesses the birth of Barbapapa.

programme.title: PAW Patrol S6 - EP 622
programme.desc: Travelling Travis yelps for help when he finds a mysterious creature in trouble. The PAW Patrol heads to Foggy Bottom to save a Humsquatch

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S2 - EP 208
programme.desc: Cafe Carl opens up a smoothie shop on the boardwalk! But when the coaster causes coconut chaos, Rubble & Crew know just what to do. // Rubble & Crew work together to find a construction solution when Charger's bouncy birthday surprise needs a lift!

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S2 - EP 209
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to give Grocer Gabriel the best beach day ever... including a ride on a brand new Ferris wheel at the boardwalk! // When Farmer Zoe's animals need some relaxation, the pups build a perfect place to practice yoga with Coach Karima.

programme.title: DORA S1 - EP 110
programme.desc: Dora and Boots babysit some rowdy crocs. // Dora and Boots get the Troll to try an empanada at Benny's stand. // Boots tries new wacky new boots that Tico invented. // The twins have their first pinata party, but no one can figure out how to open it.

programme.title: DORA S1 - EP 111
programme.desc: Big Red Chicken's magic goes wonky and not only shrinks himself, but causes wacky things to happen throughout the rainforest. Dora has to fix it! // Bip Bip has a concert with Tico, but he's lost! Dora and Boots have to get him to the show on time.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 124
programme.desc: Barbazoo is ready to help. But Barbabright and Barbabelle abuse his kindness and drive him crazy. // By chance, Barbazoo realizes he can imitate Barbapapa. He uses this opportunity to distribute chores to his brothers and sisters. Will they find out?

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 125
programme.desc: Following a misadventure, Barbabravo is unable to transform at all. The whole family unites to help him. // Barbabravo can't stay put and is unable to focus one an activity for very long. Barbalala offers to teach him control. Will she succeed?

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 126
programme.desc: The Barbababies think their food can make them change colours and shapes. They decide to find the right food for each of them. // Barbabeau lacks inspiration, he can't create anymore. The whole family helps by suggesting new subjects to paint.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S2 - EP 201
programme.desc: During a walk, the Barbapapa family discovers a megalith. // Barbabright has a stroke of genius: the invention of the "BAM".

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S2 - EP 202
programme.desc: Barbabelle proudly announces to her family that she wants to become a princess. // Barbabravo is moping with boredom, his brothers and sisters are all busy and no one wants to play with him.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S2 - EP 221
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew work together to transform Builder Cove's beach boardwalk into a bright, festive winter wonderland. // When a snow day gets in the way of Motor & Mix's Super Squirrely Whirly plans, Rubble & Crew do what they do best... build!

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S2 - EP 222
programme.desc: Builder Cove gets its first hotel when Farmer Zoe's cousin Hadley comes to visit. But will Hadley approve of the new hotel?// After a hiking trail mix-up confuses everyone going to Mr. Ducky-Doo's birthday party, the pups help them get back on track.

programme.title: PAW Patrol S9 - EP 925
programme.desc: When a mysterious storm drops hailstones that hatch into Baby Space Rocks, the Pups must find a way to keep them safe. // A 3-D printer leads to trouble when Eddie and Emmy make 3-D reproductions of themselves and play pranks all over Adventure Bay.

programme.title: PAW Patrol S9 - EP 926
programme.desc: Rubble's cousin, Charger, visits Adventure Bay just in time to help out when a Humdinger-caused geyser destroys Mr. Porter's cafe. // Mayor Humdinger hatches a plan to sabotage a "Shinest Ride Contest", so it's up to the Paw Patrol to save the day.

programme.title: Deer Squad S4 - EP 409
programme.desc: Baron Bite steals Jade's powerful Cool Crystal and uses it to bring the blizzard. // Professor Scratch creates an eagle kite for the twins, but it flies out of control.

programme.desc: King Thistle is confused when his magic bird-spotting book fails to identify a new creature that has made a nest in the castle. // Nanny Plum conjures up a hamster called Pippin for the twins, but the naughty new pet causes chaos in the castle.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space S2 - EP 202
programme.desc: Tim sets out to prove Kai's Dad is Captain DinoStar // Tim tries to relax, but Tia has other ideas // Tim gets the best cookies in town but soon finds that others need them more than him

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S3 - EP 303
programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose asks Rubble & Crew to fix the bridge to Bear Island. But when Speed Meister intervenes, the pups have to clean up his mess and protect the bears from a rapidly approaching storm... with help from Auntie Crane's new Bark Yard Zoomer!

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S3 - EP 304
programme.desc: A new Super Squirrely Whirly movie is playing at the drive-in theater! But when Speed Meister gets in the way, the pups spring into action to save the day. // It's Auntie Day! But can the pups finish building their present for Auntie Crane in time?

programme.title: DORA S2 - EP 204
programme.desc: Boots wants to enjoy Banana Fest, but the Guava Geyser is erupting! Dora needs to stop the geyser and save the festival. / It's Picture Day, but the Grumpy Old Troll runs away! Dora follows him into Troll World to get him to come out for the picture.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S8 - EP 804
programme.desc: Garbage Truck Blaze is competing in the ultimate trash-themed race: the Garbage Truck Challenge! But Garbage Truck Crusher is also in the race, and he'll do anything to crush the competition. Who will come out on top in this dump truck duel?

programme.title: Mr. Crocodile S1 - EP 104
programme.desc: When Mr. Crocodile loses a tooth, Daisy wants to make sure he gets a visit from the tooth fairy. // Mr. Crocodile, Daisy and their friends are scared to fetch Martin's gloves from his spooky shed.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 103
programme.desc: The barbababies find a lost baby elephant and secretly look after it. How will Barbapapa and Barbamama react to Boris? // Boris the elephant misses home. The Barbapapa decide to bring him back to Africa. On the spot, they help Boris to acclimatize.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 104
programme.desc: Barbapapa wants to teach his children to make bread, but things don't go as planned... // The Barbababies plant an avocado tree. However, it takes years before the first harvest. Barbabright has an idea to save time that may well lead to...disaster.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space S2 - EP 209
programme.desc: Tim and Tia build a time machine to avoid telling Dad the truth. // Tim goes to DinoStar's training academy, but is confused by his hero's training methods. // Uncle Tiberius comes to visit the Rexes, and Tim must be on his best behaviour.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S7 - EP 717
programme.desc: Super Wheels to the rescue! When the Bubblemaker starts trapping everything in his trouble bubbles, Blaze and Sparkle have to become superheroes to save Axle City!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S7 - EP 718
programme.desc: The Green Queen is turning everything in Axle City... green! Luckily Blaze, Watts, and Darington can transform into superheroes! Can they stop The Green Queen before Axle City is one color forever?

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S1 - EP 115
programme.desc: It's the first day of school in Builder Cove... if Rubble & Crew can finish the building in time! / The pups need a construction solution to save Farmer Zoe's crops and to keep Crunchy the beaver from taking all the water!

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S1 - EP 117
programme.desc: The pups jump into action to build an observatory to help their friend River get a cool picture of a shooting star! // After meeting Park Ranger Rose, the pups get stuck on a nature trail. But Rubble & Crew, finds a construction solution.

programme.title: PAW Patrol S4 - EP 403
programme.desc: Buddy, the playful dragon from one of Alex's books, gets out and the pups need to get him back. // Francois's trailer unhooked, and all of his critters have gotten loose!

programme.desc: Everyone is grooving to Stu and Safia's dance song, so the Deer has to stop Steel's satellite from broadcasting hypnotic dance signals. // To impress Lady Fluffpot, Sir Steel tries to get his hands on Jade's precious Rainbow Diamond!

programme.title: DORA S2 - EP 210
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Swiper re-join with his duplicates and make it to Grandma's picnic. / Dora and Boots help Bateo the Bat get to the baseball game in time to play.

programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Bruno the Bunny find his own special dance moves in time to perform with his favorite band, the Bunny Boyz!

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space S1 - EP 102
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia can't decide on the best gift for Grandma. // Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie. // Tim fakes it to prove he's just as cool as Kai's cousin.

programme.title: Peppa Pig S1 - EP 139
